senses.definition: the instructions on how to cook a certain food, including a list of the ingredients required

examples.x: She followed her grandmother's chocolate cake recipe, which included a secret ingredient.
The recipe called for fresh herbs and spices to enhance the flavor of the soup.
He found a quick and easy pasta recipe online that became an instant family favorite.
The cookbook contains recipes from various cuisines, providing a diverse range of dishes to try.
By experimenting with different recipes, she learned how to create delicious vegetarian meals.

senses.definition: any of the foods that is used in making a dish

examples.x: Flour, eggs, and sugar are the main ingredients for making a basic cake.
She always checks the list of ingredients on packaged foods for any allergens.
Fresh herbs are key ingredients in enhancing the flavor of this recipe.
The chef emphasized the importance of using high-quality ingredients for the best results.
One missing ingredient can completely change the taste of the dish.

senses.definition: to repeatedly mix something using a spoon, fork, etc.

examples.x: Beat the eggs until they are fluffy and light in color.
She had to beat the batter for several minutes to remove all the lumps.
He used a whisk to beat the cream into soft peaks.
To make a smooth sauce, you need to beat the ingredients well.
The recipe instructs to beat the butter and sugar until creamy.

senses.definition: to cut something into pieces using a knife, etc.

examples.x: She chops vegetables for the stir-fry every evening.
The butcher is chopping meat to fulfill customer orders.
The kitchen staff has chopped ingredients for today's lunch service.
Last night, she chopped herbs for the marinade.

senses.definition: to make food look more delicious by decorating it

examples.x: She garnished the salad with cherry tomatoes and fresh herbs.
The chef is in the kitchen garnishing the soup with a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
He garnished the main course with a slice of lemon and a sprig of rosemary.
They garnished the platter of sushi with slices of pickled ginger and wasabi.
The dessert was garnished with a dusting of powdered sugar and a mint leaf.

senses.definition: to cook food directly over or under high heat, typically on a metal tray

examples.x: She enjoys grilling vegetables on the barbecue during summer.
The chef suggests grilling the steak for a smoky flavor.
He plans to grill fish skewers for dinner tonight.

senses.definition: to raise the temperature of something

examples.x: The chef is currently heating the sauce on the stove.
Over time, the sunlight has heated the pavement.
Tomorrow, they will heat water for their morning tea.
Please heat the soup before serving it to the guests.
They used a blow dryer to heat the wax for the project.

senses.definition: to soak food in a seasoned liquid, typically containing oil, vinegar, herbs, and spices, to enhance its flavor and softness before cooking

examples.x: She marinates the chicken in a mixture of lemon juice, garlic, and herbs for several hours before grilling it.
He likes to marinate the tofu in a soy sauce and ginger marinade before stir-frying it with vegetables.
The chef marinates the steak in a red wine marinade overnight to tenderize and flavor it before cooking.
They marinate the shrimp in a citrus and chili marinade for a zesty flavor before skewering them for the grill.
Marinating the pork ribs in a barbecue sauce overnight infuses them with flavor before slow-roasting.

senses.definition: to remove the skin or outer layer of something, such as fruit, etc.

examples.x: Peel the banana before eating it.
She carefully peeled the apple with a knife.
Use a potato peeler to peel the skin off the potatoes.
The chef demonstrated how to peel a mango efficiently.
Before making the salad, wash and peel the carrots.

senses.definition: to cook food, especially fish, in a small amount of boiling water or another liquid

examples.x: She decided to poach the eggs for a healthier breakfast option.
The recipe suggested poaching the chicken in broth for extra flavor.
He learned how to poach salmon in white wine for a delicate taste.
To poach the pears, simmer them gently in a spiced syrup.
It's important not to let the water boil when you poach eggs, to maintain their shape.

senses.definition: to cook something, especially meat, over a fire or in an oven for an extended period

examples.x: Roast the turkey in the oven at 350° F for several hours until it's golden brown and juicy.
She loves to roast vegetables in the oven with olive oil and herbs for a flavorful side dish.
Roast the whole chicken over the fire on a rotisserie for a delicious and crispy skin.
The chef recommends roasting the beef slowly at a low temperature for maximum tenderness.
Roasting potatoes in the oven with rosemary and garlic makes for a savory side dish.

senses.definition: to cut food or other things into thin, flat pieces

examples.x: Slice the bread for sandwiches.
She sliced the cucumber for the salad.
Use a sharp knife to slice the tomatoes.
When making pizza, slice the pepperoni thinly.
He carefully sliced the cake into equal portions.

senses.definition: to move a spoon, etc. around in a liquid or other substance to completely mix it

examples.x: She gently stirred the soup, ensuring all the flavors blended perfectly before serving.
As the chef stirred the batter, the kitchen filled with the aroma of fresh cookies.
He skillfully stirred the coffee, watching the cream swirl into a delightful pattern.
The bartender carefully stirred the cocktail to mix the ingredients without disturbing the texture.
In the morning, she liked to stir her oatmeal with cinnamon for a warm and comforting breakfast.

senses.definition: to make food such as bread or cheese brown by heating it

examples.x: She likes to toast her bagels in the toaster before spreading cream cheese on top.
They decided to toast the cheese on top of the French onion soup until it's bubbling and golden.
The chef recommends toasting the sandwich in a panini press for a crunchy texture.
He prefers to toast his bread on the grill for a smoky flavor.

senses.definition: a piece of furniture on which food is prepared

examples.x: She set out all the baking ingredients on the counter before starting.
The kitchen counter was cluttered with utensils and cutting boards.
He wiped down the counter after preparing dinner.
The new house has a spacious counter, perfect for cooking and entertaining.
She rolled out the dough on the floured counter.

senses.definition: an object that is used for cooking or eating

examples.x: Make sure you have the right utensils, like a spatula and whisk, for this recipe.
The drawer was filled with various utensils, from forks to can openers.
A sharp knife is one of the most essential utensils in the kitchen.
She couldn’t find the right utensil to flip the pancakes.
Wooden utensils are preferred for stirring sauces in non-stick pans.

senses.definition: a frame made of metal on which food is cooked over a fire

examples.x: They set up the barbecue in the backyard to grill burgers and hot dogs.
A barbecue is perfect for cooking meat and vegetables with a smoky flavor.
He cleaned the barbecue thoroughly after the cookout.
The barbecue was fired up, and the aroma of grilled chicken filled the air.
They bought a new barbecue with multiple burners for their summer gatherings.

senses.definition: an electrical device used to blend, mix, or puree food and liquids into a smooth consistency

examples.x: She used the blender to make a fruit smoothie with bananas, strawberries, and yogurt.
The chef used a blender to puree the soup until it was silky smooth.
He enjoys making homemade sauces and dips using his high-speed blender.
The blender is essential for creating frozen cocktails and beverages at parties.
A powerful blender can crush ice and blend ingredients for refreshing frozen drinks in seconds.

senses.definition: a flat-bottomed pan with low sides and a long handle, typically used for frying and browning foods

examples.x: She heated oil in the frying pan before adding the vegetables to sauté.
The chef used a non-stick frying pan to cook the eggs without them sticking.
He seasoned the steak and placed it in the hot frying pan to sear both sides.
The frying pan is versatile and can be used to cook everything from pancakes to stir-fries.

senses.definition: a pan in the shape of a bowl, especially used for making Chinese dish

examples.x: She heated oil in the wok before adding the vegetables for a quick stir-fry.
A wok is ideal for cooking at high temperatures and tossing ingredients easily.
He learned to use a wok to make authentic Chinese fried rice.
The wide shape of the wok allows for even heat distribution during cooking.
She purchased a non-stick wok to make cleanup easier.

senses.definition: a device or object used for combining ingredients together to achieve a certain texture

examples.x: She used a mixer to whip cream until it formed stiff peaks for the dessert.
He prefers using a hand mixer to blend ingredients for smoothies and milkshakes.
The mixer comes with various attachments for different tasks, such as kneading dough or mixing cookie batter.
In baking, a mixer is essential for achieving the right consistency in doughs and batters.

senses.definition: the removable cover at the top of a container

examples.x: She placed the lid on the pot to let the soup simmer.
Make sure the lid is tightly closed to keep the food fresh.
He struggled to remove the lid from the jar of pickles.
The lid of the pan helps retain heat and moisture while cooking.
She accidentally dropped the lid, making a loud clatter on the kitchen floor.

senses.definition: a bowl typically used in cooking and baking for combining ingredients

examples.x: She used a large mixing bowl to combine flour, sugar, and eggs for the cake batter.
The recipe instructed him to whisk the dressing ingredients together in a small mixing bowl.
He prefers using a stainless steel mixing bowl for making bread dough because it's easy to clean.
The set of nesting mixing bowls includes different sizes for various cooking needs.

senses.definition: a spoon that is made of wood

examples.x: She used a wooden spoon to stir the sauce to prevent scratching the pot.
A wooden spoon is a must-have for mixing batters and doughs.
The wooden spoon has been passed down in the family for generations.
He reached for a wooden spoon to serve the pasta.
Wooden spoons are ideal for cooking because they don’t conduct heat.

senses.definition: a device used to weigh people or objects

examples.x: The bathroom scale indicated that she had lost a few pounds after her diet and exercise regimen.
The warehouse manager used a large industrial scale to weigh the shipments of goods.
The doctor's office had a digital scale to measure patients' weight accurately during check-ups.
The airline baggage check-in counter had a scale to ensure that luggage met weight restrictions.
The jeweler employed a precision scale to weigh precious metals and gemstones for crafting jewelry.

senses.definition: a slight amount of something one can hold between the index finger and thumb

examples.x: Add a pinch of salt to enhance the flavor of the dish.
He sprinkled a pinch of cinnamon on top of his coffee.
A pinch of sugar balances the acidity in the tomato sauce.
She added a pinch of herbs for extra aroma in her soup.
Even a pinch of cayenne pepper can make the dish quite spicy.

senses.definition: the amount that fills a cup, typically a standard measuring cup used in cooking and baking

examples.x: The recipe called for two cupfuls of flour to make the dough.
She poured a cupful of milk into the batter to achieve the right consistency.
He measured three cupfuls of rice for dinner to serve the family.
The bartender poured two cupfuls of water into the cocktail shaker before mixing the drinks.
A cupful of sugar was enough to sweeten the entire batch of cookies.

senses.definition: the amount that fills a spoon, typically a standard eating or measuring spoon

examples.x: She added a spoonful of honey to her tea for sweetness.
The recipe called for three spoonfuls of vanilla extract to flavor the cake batter.
He took a spoonful of medicine to alleviate his sore throat.
The child eagerly ate spoonfuls of ice cream on a hot summer day.
Grandma's soup was so flavorful that every spoonful was a delight.
